name: Ape JalDoot
description: Jaldoot delivers membrane-filtered water to users.

taxonomy.sub_category: Ape JalDoot Updated on January 10, 2024 · Created on September 27, 2018 Ape JalDoot Jaldoot delivers membrane-filtered water to users. Developed By Membrane Filters (India) Pvt Ltd. Tested By CSIR-National Chemical Laboratory, India ICMR – National Institute of Virology, India Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Jaldoot purifies water from the source through the filtration technology mounted on a three-wheeler auto rickshaw, stores it and delivers it to the end user. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being Target Users (Target Impact Group) Community Distributors / Implementing Organizations Membrane Filters Ltd., other dealers and distributors available all over India Countries India Manufacturing/Building Method The product is manufactured by Membrane Filters Pvt Ltd. in Pune, India. Intellectural Property Type Patent User Provision Model Users can contact Membrane Filters Ltd. “Jaldoot” vehicles are distributed at the established distribution centers, which are managed and run by the manufacturer. Distributions to Date Status As of 2015, 120+ Description of delivery service Mobile water dispensing vehicles Water source type Surface water Integrated treatment (yes/no) Yes, Ultrafiltration Design Specifications Jaldoot has an integration of three technologies: ultrafiltration membrane, PTO shaft drive and a multistage filtration system. Jaldoot works with a suction pipe which is dipped into the water source that allows water to pass through the multistage filtration system. The pump that is required for connecting to the water source and filtration system is driven by running the engine. The ultrafiltration membrane system together with the 500 litre capacity stainless steel tank are mounted on a mini tempo or a three wheeler auto rickshaw. This process takes 20 minutes to filter and fill the tank. Product Schematics Technical Support Training provided for how to use the product by the distributor or manufacturer. Replacement Components Contact manufacturer Lifecycle Unknown Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters 100% potable and responsible for removing 100% Cholera, Typhoid, gastroenteritis, diarrhea, giardiasis, and jaundice. Vetted Performance Status Although not officially published, Jaldoot claims to have been developed in National Chemical Laboratory (NCL) Pune and tested in both NCL and National Institute of Virology.Correspondence with manufacturer Safety Road safety necessary while driving the vehicle. Complementary Technical Systems None Academic Research and References Membranefilters.in. Available: http://membranefilters.in/clientele.aspx “Ape jaldoot – Indiamart,” Indiamart.com. Available: https://dir.indiamart.com/search.mp?ss=ape+jaldoot&res=RC3&Mspl=0&qry_typ=P. “Goal 6,” Sdgs.un.org. Available: https://sdgs.un.org/goals/goal6 Membranefilters.in. Available: http://membranefilters.in/Jaldoot.aspx Compliance with regulations Unknown Evaluation methods Evaluation methods are unknown, however the manufactures claim to be laboratory tested.
